folderName: Vinesong Flow + Mirecurl Drawl + Bramblewood Burr
folderPath: voice-models/biome-crossovers/Vinesong Flow + Mirecurl Drawl + Bramblewood Burr/
accentBlendName: Vinesong Flow + Mirecurl Drawl + Bramblewood Burr
voiceFeelBlend: Flowing, fertile, elegant, soft + Slow, earthy, wet, lived-in + Rustic, layered, grounded, woodland
modelDuplicationRule: Do not place voice model binaries in this crossover folder. Let users choose models from the component main accent manifests.

components.raceOverlayBehavior: Elves make it smooth and lyrical; halflings make it warm; beastfolk make it expressive and lively.
components.classOverlayBehavior: Merchants sound polished; bards sound romantic; clerics sound calm and measured.

components.raceOverlayBehavior: Halflings make it friendly; beastfolk make it rhythmic; orcs make it rough and muddy.
components.classOverlayBehavior: Rangers sound local and practical; clerics sound slow and steady; rogues sound secretive.

components.raceOverlayBehavior: Elves smooth it out; dwarves make it rustic; beastfolk make it earthy and lively.
components.classOverlayBehavior: Rangers sound very natural; artisans sound local; warriors sound sturdy.

userChoicePolicy.accentHeldBy: selected main accent model or backend reference conditioning

layeringRules.crossoverBehavior: For a three-biome cache, each component accent contributes one selectable model layer. Suggested layers start enabled and can be disabled or re-enabled by the player.
layeringRules.intensityBehavior: Each enabled layer has a 0-100 intensity slider. Raw percentages are preserved, and a normalized weight is computed so enabled layers sum to 1.0 for backend mixing.
layeringRules.modelDuplicationRule: Main accent folders own reusable model pointers. Crossover folders contain only manifests that reference main accent models.
layeringRules.example: Irish 16%, Thai 37%, Creole 47% is represented as three enabled weightedLayer entries.

audioTransportRules.browserSpeechNote: Web Speech preview seek is approximate because speechSynthesis does not expose a waveform timeline. Real generated audio clips use normal media currentTime seeking.
